scope: Coheronia v0.4 persistent shell and configured simulation containers, plus public repository closeout.
summary: Adds a persistent title/character/world shell and makes each world a saved ruleset plus terrain plus history. World creation exposes size, seed, presets, six difficulty axes, environment danger, simulation rules, terrain controls, resource abundance, and independent ore/tree/bush seed channels. Gameplay systems now read from WorldConfig and character data. Closeout updates public docs, project metadata, validator coverage, and smoke evidence.
acceptance: Shell persistence verified: characters and worlds persist to user:// shell/world files
Generation settings verified: ore abundance, density controls, and independent ore seed variation pass smoke checks
Rule toggles verified: food, weather, darkness, and lighting safety are consumed by gameplay
Difficulty axes verified: enemy and impressionability scale gameplay behavior; economy/ruler/survival are wired in model/food pressure
Character traits/roles verified: role items, max health, mining speed, reach/food/growth effects are data-driven
Save/load verified across player, terrain, stockpile, lights, threats, tool tier, regrow timer, and storm state
Public profile coherent: manifest visibility public, capsule doctor public_repo usable_with_warnings before remote creation
validation: python _protocol/Project_Ops_Capsule/scripts/capsule_doctor.py . --profile public_repo -> usable_with_warnings (dirty/no remote before commit)
public safety rg scan -> no secret/token/private-profile hits outside protected historical/reference material
Start-Process waited Godot smoke -> SMOKE RESULT: PASS (62/62 passed)
user://smoke_results.json -> result PASS, passed 62, total 62, timestamp 2026-07-02T13:32:27
decisions: Use shell scene as project main scene
Treat worlds as config plus terrain plus history plus state
Expose world size and per-block generation channels in data/world_settings.json
Keep several requested social/survival toggles future-facing but persisted
Use public_repo profile for publication after explicit operator request
risks: Several toggles are stored but not yet consumed by systems
Human play feel/tuning is lighter than automated coverage
No explicit license has been added
next_action: Create public GitHub repo, push main, rerun public capsule doctor after remote exists.
overrides: Operator explicitly requested public GitHub publication.
